title: Observed pre-mockup AI visibility baseline
source: Manual benchmark from uploaded Excel and prompt presence dashboard
method: 48 Hungarian insurance prompts were tested across OpenAI / ChatGPT, Google / Gemini and Anthropic / Claude. A brand is counted as present when it appeared at least once in a model's answer for a given prompt.
strategic_reading: NN starts from a strong prompt-level presence baseline, but the next opportunity is to increase product-specific, citable and actionable visibility. The mockup assets should not only increase NN mentions, but turn mentions into explicit NN next-step links and citations.

target_metrics.target_direction: Increase or defend strong baseline while improving quality of presence
Increase coverage in prompts where NN is currently absent
Increase explicit nn.hu links to product pages, calculators, guides, research and advisor handoff

target_metrics.baseline: NN is mentioned more often than the average competitor, but links/cites are limited
target_metrics.target_direction: Move from brand mention to recommended next step
